summary: Completed testing of Invoice API v1, Referral System (3 levels: 5%, 3%, 1%), and Admin Merchant Fee Settings for P2P Crypto Exchange REP01-main with BIT-9-DOK-main integrations

minor.issue: Frontend shows 'Ошибка загрузки настроек' error toast when clicking settings button, but API works correctly via pytest

integration_issues.issue: Settings modal shows loading error toast when opened from merchants list, though backend API returns 200
affected_selectors: gear icon button on merchant row

issues: Minor: 'Ошибка загрузки данных' error toast appears on initial load

action_items: Investigate frontend error when loading merchant fee settings modal - API works but frontend shows error
Check admin dashboard data loading error on initial load
critical_code_review_comments: Invoice API v1 correctly implements X-Api-Key authentication
Admin merchant fee settings API endpoints work correctly
Frontend Referrals.js page has proper data-testid attributes for testing

success_rate.frontend: 90% (Referrals page works, Admin merchant settings modal has loading issue)

seed_data_creation: Created test traders during pytest execution for referral chain testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs for Invoice v1, Referral System, and Admin Merchant Fee Settings are working. Frontend Referrals page works correctly with 3-level referral display. Admin merchant settings modal has a frontend loading issue that needs investigation - the API returns correct data but frontend shows error toast.

invoice_api_v1.GET /api/v1/invoice/docs: PASS - Returns API documentation without auth
invoice_api_v1.GET /api/v1/invoice/payment-methods: PASS - Requires X-Api-Key, returns 401 for invalid key

referral_system.GET /api/referral: PASS - Returns referral data with 3 levels (5%, 3%, 1%)

admin_merchant_fee_settings.PUT /api/admin/merchants/{id}/fee-settin: PASS - Updates fee model and commission rate
admin_merchant_fee_settings.PUT /api/admin/merchants/{id}/method-com: PASS - Updates method commissions with intervals
